zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot於大約1255年出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特時，他的父親Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant26歲，母親Adélaïde de Bourgogne23歲。他於1274年與Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年7月11日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot于大约1255年出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特时，他的父亲Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant26岁，母亲Adélaïde de Bourgogne23岁。他于1274年与Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年7月11日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot was born about 1255, in Flemish Brabant, Belgium, his father, Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant, was 26 and his mother, Adélaïde de Bourgogne, was 23. He married Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon in 1274. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 11 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot est né environ 1255, à Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Bourgogne, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot um 1255 in Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant 26 und seine Mutter Adélaïde de Bourgogne 23. Er hat 1274 Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1302 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot è nato il circa 1255 nel Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, il suo padre, Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde de Bourgogne, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfried van Brabant-Aarschotが約1255年にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントで生まれた時，父Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabantは26歳，母Adélaïde de Bourgogneは23歳であった。1274年にJeanne Isabeau de Vierzonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年7月11日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot(이)가 대략 1255년 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde de Bourgogne(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1274년 Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 7월 11일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리j크에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Bourgogne, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon em 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot родился около 1255 г. в местности влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Bourgogne, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon в 1274 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot nació aproximadamente 1255, en Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de Bourgogne, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon en 1274. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años.
